title: Monday.execute('openSettings') is not defined
excerpt: The openSettings works fine but it isn’t defined yet. Typescript developer would be annoyed

Hi @thinhle183,

Thank you for bringing this to our attention! This is a popular request. I’ve passed this on to our development team so they can get a better idea of the demand.
